title: All 7 services healthy
evidence: Coordinator: healthy, uptime 307s, isLeader=true. P1-P4: all healthy, all chains connected. Execution: healthy, 84.83% success rate, simulationMode=true. Cross-chain: healthy, 12 chains monitored, ML active.

title: Leader elected with healthy lock TTL
Circuit breaker CLOSED with zero failures
7 of 19 expected streams missing (on-demand/feature-gated)
evidence: Missing: service-health, service-events, coordinator-events, health-alerts, circuit-breaker, system-commands, fast-lane. Unexpected: service-degradation (exists in 24-stream inventory).
recommendation: On-demand streams created at first use - acceptable for runtime baseline

title: Execution engine consumer lag 749 pending messages
evidence: 749 pending on execution-engine-group. Min ID 1772779960542 (~70s old). Consumer: execution-engine-local-1772779746780. Active executions=574, queueSize=569.
recommendation: Expected in simulation with high detection rate. Consumer is actively processing (574 active executions) but detection outpaces execution.

title: All 13 chains connected and producing events across 4 partitions
evidence: P1: BSC=2246, Polygon=1008, AVAX=1598, FTM=721. P2: ARB=4445, OP=1742, Base=2934, Scroll=492, Blast=297. P3: ETH=2574, zkSync=666, Linea=685. P4: Solana=45990. All status=connected.

title: Drawdown state NORMAL - trading at 100% capacity
evidence: riskState=NORMAL, tradingAllowed=true, positionSizeMultiplier=1, currentDrawdown=0, riskDrawdownBlocks=0, riskHaltCount=0

title: Pipeline latency 3ms p95 - well under 50ms target
evidence: P1 p50=3ms p95=3ms p99=3ms. P2 p50=3ms p95=3ms p99=3ms. P3 p50=3ms p95=3ms p99=3ms. P4 p50=0ms p95=0ms p99=0ms (Solana different path).

title: All chain gas prices report 0 gwei
evidence: arbitrage_gas_price_gwei = 0 for all 14 chains (ethereum, arbitrum, optimism, base, bsc, polygon, avalanche, fantom, zksync, linea, blast, scroll, mantle, mode)
actual: All 0 (simulation mode - no real RPC connections for gas)
recommendation: Expected in simulation mode. Verify gas price fetching in production by checking RPC connections.

title: Simulation mode active, 0 healthy providers (expected)
actual: All trades simulated without external providers
recommendation: No action needed in simulation mode

title: Memory usage healthy across all services
evidence: P1=196MB, P2=86MB, P3=76MB, P4=44MB, Exec=58MB, CrossChain=157MB. Redis=53.88MB/512MB (10.5%).
actual: All well below limits. Redis at 10.5%.

title: Health endpoint schemas valid for all services
evidence: All 7 services return status (healthy), uptime (number>0). Partitions include chains array, eventsProcessed. Execution includes simulationMode, successRate, riskState. Cross-chain includes chainsMonitored, mlPredictorActive.
expected: Required fields present with correct types

title: Some expected metrics missing from Prometheus scrape
evidence: P1 has pipeline_latency, stream_length, stream_pending, stream_health_status. Missing: price_updates_total, opportunities_detected_total, events_processed_total as standalone counters. Execution has arbitrage_execution_attempts_total, arbitrage_gas_price_gwei. Missing: arbitrage_execution_success_total as separate counter. Cross-chain has cross_chain_opportunities_total, published, deduplicated, detection_cycles.
actual: Core metrics present, some expected counters provided through different metric names
recommendation: Minor naming differences from expected schema - actual metrics provide equivalent observability

title: Non-execution consumer groups have minimal lag
evidence: opportunities/coordinator-group: 25 pending. price-updates/coordinator-group: 1 pending. price-updates/cross-chain-detector-group: 3 pending. execution-results/coordinator-group: 2 pending.
